title: RNA Samples Steps
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fmbeo","text":"For Transcriptomics During One-Step Growth Curves for Cellulophaga Phages protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":4,"length":78}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"51F5C786C6CF4445A080BDD48C9FD370","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Transcriptomics-During-One-Step-Growth-Curves-for-dem3c5"}}}}
steps: Use a serological pipet to sample 30 ml from each flask into a 50 ml falcon tube
Resuspend the pellet in 1 ml RNALater and transfer to a 1.5 or 2 ml tube
Store samples at 4°C for up to 4 weeks
creator: Verve Team
